description_long: This object consists of four adult pedestrians standing side by side, each with distinct attire and posture. The first individual is a woman in a short dress with a necklace and high heels, exuding a fashionable urban style. The second is a man in a formal suit and bow tie, presenting a business or formal appearance. The third is a woman in a blouse and knee-length skirt, with a casual yet neat look, and she is barefoot. The fourth is a man in a casual t-shirt and pants, wearing casual shoes, and has a relaxed stance. Each figure is detailed with visible facial features, hair styles, and realistic body proportions. The group represents a diverse cross-section of typical urban pedestrians, suitable for populating city streets or public spaces.
description: A group of four adult pedestrians, each with distinct clothing styles: a woman in a dress, a man in a suit, a woman in a blouse and skirt, and a man in casual wear, all standing in relaxed postures.
description_view_0: Four adults are visible from the front, showing their full outfits and facial features, with clear distinction in clothing styles and postures.
description_view_1: The group is seen from the side, with the figures aligned in a row, revealing the profiles and depth of each person.
description_view_2: The adults are viewed from the opposite front, again showing their faces and outfits, but with the order of individuals reversed compared to view 0.
description_view_3: The group is seen from the other side, displaying the opposite profiles and the arrangement of the figures from a lateral perspective.
attribute_clothing_type: short dress with necklace, business suit with bow tie, blouse and knee-length skirt, casual t-shirt and pants
attribute_footwear_type: high heels, dress shoes, barefoot, casual shoes
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair, short hair, shoulder-length straight hair, short styled hair
